home.promo: Limited Time: Get 2 months free on annual plans.
home.heroSubtitle: Jenny AI handles dispatch, scheduling, and customer communication — so you can focus on growing your business.
home.featuresSubtitle: Jenny AI handles intelligent dispatch, route optimization, and 24/7 customer communication. Combined with built-in compliance tools, bilingual support, mobile apps, and real-time analytics — everything your growing team needs.
home.demosSubtitle: Click any feature below to see exactly how ToolTime Pro works. No signup required.
home.whySubtitle: We built ToolTime Pro for contractors tired of overpaying for enterprise software or choosing between affordability and capability.
home.whyAiDesc: Jenny AI handles intelligent dispatch, route optimization, and workload balancing — included in every plan at no extra cost.
home.whyComplianceDesc: ToolTime Shield keeps you compliant with worker classification laws, wage regulations, and HR requirements. No competitor includes this.
home.whyPricingDesc: $49–$129/month with no surprise per-user fees. Competitors charge $20/vehicle or $250+/tech for the same features.
home.whySpanishDesc: Native bilingual interface in every tier. Over 40% of field crews are Spanish-speaking — we built for them from day one.
home.whyFastDesc: Running in 1–2 weeks, not 6–12 months. No expensive consultants, no lengthy onboarding. See ROI immediately.
home.plansSubtitle: No hidden fees. No per-user add-on costs. AI dispatch included in every plan.
home.trialNote: 14-day free trial • No credit card required

home.addJennyDesc: Jenny handles calls, chat, SMS, and keeps you compliant 24/7. Choose the tier that fits your needs.
home.fullPricingLink: See full pricing details & customize your plan
home.footerCtaTitle: Ready to Put Your Business On Autopilot?
home.footerCtaSubtitle: Join hundreds of service businesses using ToolTime Pro to save time, stay compliant, and get more customers.
home.footerDesc: The all-in-one platform for service businesses. Website, scheduling, worker app, HR & compliance — we set it up, you run your business.
home.whyMultiLocationDesc: Manage multiple service areas from one dashboard. Separate crews, schedules, and reporting per location — perfect for growing businesses and franchises.
home.jennyExecFeature4: For owners only (not shown to workers)
home.fullPricingLink: See full pricing details & customize your plan
home.features_0_desc: One AI, three tiers. Jenny Lite (free): website chatbot that captures leads 24/7. Jenny Pro ($49/mo): answers phone calls with bilingual voice, books appointments, sends SMS. Jenny Exec ($79/mo): compliance monitoring, HR law updates, business analytics. Plus 15 autonomous actions that run your back office automatically.
home.features_1_desc: Create professional quotes in seconds. Voice, photo, or manual entry. Customers approve with e-signature. Close deals 3x faster.
home.features_2_desc: Auto-requests Google & Yelp reviews via SMS after every job. Configurable delay, click tracking, and AI-generated responses. Included with all plans.
home.features_3_desc: Describe a job and get exact material lists with Good/Better/Best pricing. Supports painting, plumbing, electrical, roofing, fencing, concrete, and 15 more trades. Contractor markup engine included.
home.features_4_desc: Give customers a branded portal: live job tracker, before/after photo gallery, messaging, document vault, service history, and invoice payments. $24/mo or included with Elite.
home.features_5_desc: Your crew sees their jobs, clocks in/out with location proof, uploads photos, and reports issues. Full compliance tracking built-in.
home.features_6_desc: Manage W-2 employees and 1099 contractors side by side. Separate payment flows, classification guardrails, cert tracking, and multi-state compliance (CA, TX, FL, NY, IL).
home.features_7_desc: Worker classification quiz, final wage calculator, AB5 compliance checklists. Protect yourself from costly lawsuits.
home.features_8_desc: See all your crews on a map in real-time. Drag-and-drop job assignments. Send "running late" alerts automatically.
home.features_9_desc: Automatically plan the most efficient routes for your crews. Save on gas and fit more jobs in each day.
home.features_10_desc: Two-way sync with QuickBooks Online. Invoices, payments, and customers sync automatically. No double entry. $12/mo add-on.
home.features_11_desc: We create your branded site. Mobile-optimized, fast, designed to convert visitors into paying customers.
home.features_12_desc: Let customers book online 24/7. Smart calendar prevents double-bookings. Automatic reminders reduce no-shows.
home.features_13_desc: Send professional invoices. Accept credit cards with low fees. Get paid faster with automated payment reminders.
home.demoCards_0_desc: Meet Jenny — your AI that answers calls, writes quotes, captures leads, and requests reviews 24/7
home.demoCards_1_desc: Create professional quotes in seconds — close deals 3x faster
home.demoCards_2_desc: Automate 5-star reviews — powered by Jenny, more reviews = more customers

home.demoCards_5_desc: AB5 compliance, final pay calculator, HR docs

home.demoCards_7_desc: Real-time crew tracking and job assignment

home.demoCards_11_desc: See jobs, revenue, crew status at a glance

industries.heroSubtitle: Unlike competitors who limit you to their list, ToolTime Pro adapts to YOUR business. If you schedule jobs and manage workers, we've got you covered.
industries.noResultsSub: But don't worry — ToolTime Pro works for ANY service business!
industries.dontSeeYoursDesc: That's the point. ToolTime Pro isn't limited to a checkbox list. If you run a service business — any service business — our platform adapts to you. Custom services, custom workflows, your way.
industries.whyTitle: Why Service Pros Choose ToolTime Pro
industries.whySubtitle: While other software makes you fit their mold, we built ToolTime Pro to fit yours.
industries.industryAgnosticDesc: Define your own services, pricing, and workflows. No forcing your business into pre-built templates.
industries.halfThePriceDesc: Save 50-77% compared to Jobber. Same features, better value. No $29/user hidden fees.
industries.complianceBuiltInDesc: ToolTime Shield keeps you legal with CA labor law compliance, final pay calculators, and HR docs.
industries.footerDesc: The all-in-one platform for service businesses. Website, scheduling, worker app, HR & compliance — we set it up, you run your business.
industries.soundFamiliarDesc: {name} businesses deal with these challenges every day. ToolTime Pro helps.
industries.toolTimeHelps: ToolTime Pro helps with all of this.

industries.everythingYouNeedDesc: ToolTime Pro gives you the tools to schedule, quote, manage your team, and get paid - all in one place.
industries.smartSchedulingDesc: Drag-and-drop calendar with recurring jobs, automated customer reminders, and easy rescheduling.
industries.crewMobileAppDesc: Your team gets job details, customer info, navigation, time tracking, and photo uploads - all in one app.
industries.quotingInvoicingDesc: Create professional quotes on-site, convert to invoices with one tap, and get paid online by card.
industries.toolTimeShieldDesc: California labor law compliance built-in. Worker classification tools, final pay calculators, and HR document templates.
industries.bookingWebsiteDesc: We build and host your professional website with online booking - included free with every plan.
industries.businessReportsDesc: Track revenue, see job history, and monitor your business performance with real-time dashboards.
industries.readyToGrowDesc: Join thousands of California service pros who use ToolTime Pro. Start your free 14-day trial - no credit card required.
